name: aside-vscode
displayName: Aside — curiosities while the AI thinks
description: Shows a short developer curiosity in the VS Code status bar while Claude Code is thinking. Local-first, privacy-preserving.

aside.backendUrl.description: Base URL of the Aside backend that serves curiosities.

aside.enabled.description: Show curiosities in the status bar.

aside.detectThinkingFromTerminal.markdownDescription: **Off by default.** When on, Aside receives integrated-terminal writes and tests each one against a single spinner regex to know when Claude is thinking, then **immediately discards** it. No terminal content is ever stored, logged, buffered, or sent. When off, Aside reads nothing from your terminal and rotates on a timer instead.

aside.idleRotateSeconds.description: When thinking can't be detected, rotate the curiosity on this interval.
